stem: On the first day of a season, a soccer club has 75 members. Each day after the first day of the season, 8 new members join the club. If no members leave the club, how many total members will the club have 5 days after the first day of the season?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. After 5 days, 5 × 8 = 40 new members have joined. Adding to the original 75 gives 75 + 40 = 115 total members.

Choice B adds only one day's new members. Choice C is the initial count. Choice D multiplies incorrectly.
